title: Tower Crane on Construction Site Coloring Page
seoTitle: Tower Crane on Construction Site Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Download and print this detailed tower crane building a skyscraper in the city. Free high-res PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Crawler cranes use long lattice booms to lift heavy steel beams, while tower cranes construct skyscrapers.
They provide the structural frameworks and hoisting capabilities required for modern skyscrapers and bridges.
They utilize heavy steel counterweights and wire ropes to balance and lift loads weighing hundreds of tons.
